curation_status: TEMPLATE - requires Jules agent curation before Phase 3 construction
curation_instructions: Review each tool. Confirm name, description, and props match real UI interactions. Remove tools that do not map to real features. Add missing tools for key user journeys. Tools are discovered by the VOIX Chrome extension and presented to AI agents.

tools.name: search_results
tools.description: Search or filter aivs proof bundle verification in ProofDrop.

props.name: status
props.description: Optional status filter (e.g. PASS, FAIL, all).

tools.example_prompt: Search for recent aivs proof bundle verification
tools.html_element: <tool name="search_results"><prop name="query" type="string" required="true">Search query</prop><prop name="status" type="string">Status filter</prop></tool>
tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: update to match actual search/filter UI in ProofDrop.

tools.name: aivs_proof_bundle_verification
tools.description: Access the AIVS proof bundle verification feature: Accept JSON paste or file upload; validate AIVS schema with Zod; run deterministic PASS/FAIL verification using @protoco

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID to open a specific aivs proof bundle verification record.

tools.example_prompt: Show me aivs proof bundle verification
tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: wire to the actual AIVS proof bundle verification UI component. Add/remove props to match real inputs.

tools.name: permanent_tamper_evident_receipt
tools.description: Access the Permanent tamper-evident receipt feature: Derive receipt ID deterministically from bundle hash (rcpt_ + first 32 hex chars of SHA-256). Same bundle always produce

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID to open a specific permanent tamper-evident receipt record.

tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: wire to the actual Permanent tamper-evident receipt UI component. Add/remove props to match real inputs.

tools.name: public_read_only_receipt_page___receipt_
tools.description: Access the Public read-only receipt page (/receipt/[id]) feature: No auth required. Shows PASS/FAIL badge, bundle ID, content hash, audit timeline (captured/verified/receipt created), ve

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID to open a specific public read-only receipt page (/receipt/[id]) record.

tools.example_prompt: Show me public read-only receipt page (/receipt/[id])
tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: wire to the actual Public read-only receipt page (/receipt/[id]) UI component. Add/remove props to match real inputs.

tools.name: google_oauth_sign_in
tools.description: Access the Google OAuth sign-in feature: Optional sign-in with Google via NextAuth.js. Signed-in users get receipt history saved, higher rate limits, and access

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID to open a specific google oauth sign-in record.

tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: wire to the actual Google OAuth sign-in UI component. Add/remove props to match real inputs.

tools.name: dashboard___receipt_history
tools.description: Access the Dashboard — receipt history feature: Authenticated users see paginated table of all their receipts: ID, status badge, date, view/export actions. Protected ro

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID to open a specific dashboard — receipt history record.

tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: wire to the actual Dashboard — receipt history UI component. Add/remove props to match real inputs.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get pricing information and plan details for ProofDrop.

props.name: plan
props.description: Plan tier to query. Options: Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise.

tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: confirm plan names match Stripe products.

tools.name: start_trial
tools.description: Initiate sign-up or free trial for ProofDrop.

props.name: plan
props.description: Optional plan to pre-select (e.g. starter, pro).

tools.example_prompt: Sign me up for a free trial
tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: link to the signup page or trigger the sign-in modal.

tools.name: get_help
tools.description: Get help, documentation, or support for ProofDrop.

props.name: topic
props.description: Topic or feature to get help with.

tools.example_prompt: How do I export my data?
tools.curation_note: CUSTOMIZE: open help docs, chat widget, or FAQ page.

context_elements.name: user_session
context_elements.description: Current authenticated user session state (PUBLIC data only).

exposed_fields.name: is_authenticated
exposed_fields.description: Whether the user is signed in.

exposed_fields.name: display_name
exposed_fields.description: User display name - never email or user ID.

context_elements.security: NEVER expose: API keys, passwords, tokens, payment data, raw user IDs.

context_elements.name: page_context
context_elements.description: Public metadata about the current page (route, visible features).

exposed_fields.name: available_tools
exposed_fields.description: List of tool names active on this page.

ai_provider_support.note: All tools work across providers. Primary providers cover ~80% of agent traffic.

security_notes: All tools execute client-side via the user VOIX browser extension.
No server-side tracking of AI agent interactions.
Context elements must contain PUBLIC data only - never credentials or PII.
Users control which AI provider sees their context data.
